items.title: Animal Production, Veterinary Industry Conferences To Merge Under Gavis 2026
items.summary: Ten annual conferences by associations in the animal production and veterinary industries, traditionally held separately, will instead be combined under the inaugural Gavis 2026 summit from July 21-23 in Putrajaya to save costs and time for participants. The post Animal Production, Veterinary Industry Conferences To Merge Under Gavis 2026 appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Is Male Infertility The Missing Piece? When Men Need To Be Part Of The Fertility Conversation
items.summary: When a couple struggles to conceive, it is rarely a one-sided story. Yet for decades, the fertility spotlight has shone almost exclusively on women. It is time to change that conversation – and science is firmly on our side. The post Is Male Infertility The Missing Piece? When Men Need To Be Part Of The Fertility Conversation appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Three Generations, Two Battles: How Dengue Stole What Mattered Most
items.summary: Dengue affects all age groups, from young children to the elderly, and infection can happen more than once because there are four different strains of the virus. The post Three Generations, Two Battles: How Dengue Stole What Mattered Most appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Defusing The Bomb: Fixing Malaysia’s NCD Crisis Before It’s Too Late — Dr Rajeentheran Suntheralingam
items.summary: Every ringgit we continue to pour into sugar subsidies is a ringgit stolen from dialysis chairs, from cancer treatment, from the nurses and doctors who hold the system together. items.title: Growing Old Without Growing Poor
items.summary: If Malaysia chooses to act now — on retirement income, social security, health care and family support — we can ensure that our citizens grow old without growing poor. The post Growing Old Without Growing Poor appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Over 1,000 Aged Care Homes Operating Without Licence In Malaysia
items.summary: Malaysia may have more than 1,000 unlicensed aged care homes, raising concerns about oversight and safety standards. The warning comes as population ageing accelerates and fees for resort-like senior living reach RM8,000-RM9,000 a month. The post Over 1,000 Aged Care Homes Operating Without Licence In Malaysia appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Nadma Must Coordinate National Preparedness For El Niño — Susden Malaysia
items.summary: National preparedness for El Niño through 2027 is a shared national responsibility that requires the active participation of all levels of government and all segments of society. items.title: Many Specialists From Master’s Programmes Rejected For Subspecialty Training Due To LNPT Requirement — Physician
items.summary: In the June 16 results of the latest subspecialty training intake, a significant number of specialists who completed local Master's programmes were rejected, mainly because they were short of one LNPT assessment. These rejections cut across various fields. The post Many Specialists From Master’s Programmes Rejected For Subspecialty Training Due To LNPT Requirement — Physician appeared first on CodeBlue .
